description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, depicted in a standing pose with arms slightly extended outward. The figure wears a short, fitted skirt with a checkered pattern and a visible waistband, paired with a form-fitting top. The legs are long and straight, and the feet are flat on the ground, suggesting a relaxed, neutral stance. The figure's hair is long and flows down past the shoulders, with a slight wave visible from the side views. The silhouette is smooth and simplified, with no visible facial features or detailed anatomy. The overall appearance is minimalistic, focusing on the general shape and attire rather than intricate details.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a short checkered skirt and fitted top, standing upright with long hair and a minimalistic silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full skirt, waistband, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the length of the hair.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the skirt, hair, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body and the flow of the hair.
attribute_clothing_type: short fitted skirt and form-fitting top
